metadata.source: IPCC Sixth Assessment Report (AR6) — Working Group III, Annex II (Emission Factors)
metadata.notes: Global warming potentials (GWP100) from AR6 WGI Chapter 7. Used for cross-country comparability.
metadata.coverage: Global. Supersedes IPCC AR5 GWP values for CH4 (now 29.8) and N2O (now 273).

factors.source: IPCC AR6 WGIII Annex II, Table A.III.2 — Passenger transport emissions intensity
factors.notes: Global average across vehicle fleet ages and fuel types. Higher than DEFRA UK figure due to older global fleet.

factors.source: IPCC AR6 WGIII Chapter 6, Table 6.4 (electricity system emission intensities)
factors.notes: Global average 2019 data. Declining as renewables penetration increases.

factors.source: IPCC AR6 WGIII Chapter 12, Table 12.3 — Food system emissions
factors.notes: Global average per-capita food system emissions including land use change, agriculture, processing, transport, retail, waste.

1_5c_budget_2030.source: IPCC AR6 WGIII SPM, Figure SPM.5
1_5c_budget_2030.notes: Approximate annual per-capita budget consistent with 1.5°C pathway by 2030, global average.

2c_budget_2030.notes: Approximate annual per-capita budget consistent with 2°C pathway by 2030.
